fieldValues.constraint: under 800 words, plain English, no jargon
fieldValues.section_1: The Hook/The Problem: Highlight the pain point [PAIN_POINT] in 2-3 sentences.
fieldValues.section_2: The Core/The Solution: Provide 3 actionable steps to achieve [GOAL].
fieldValues.section_3: The CTA/The Summary: Give the reader a next step based on [NEXT_STEP].
fieldValues.formatting: Use bullet points, bold key terms, no fluff, high skimmability
fieldValues.fillin_guide:
[TOPIC]: the subject of the piece — e.g., async programming in Python
[PAIN_POINT]: the reader's current frustration — e.g., callbacks creating unreadable nested code
[GOAL]: the outcome the reader wants — e.g., write linear, debuggable async code
[NEXT_STEP]: the immediate action to take — e.g., refactor one function with async/await today
